company: Trust In SODA (client: German e-commerce company)
title: Marketing Analytics Lead
required_skills: Experience in Marketing Analytics, Growth Analytics or similar data-focused roles
Proven track record of leading data initiatives or mentoring analysts
Excellent communication skills for non-technical stakeholders
matched_skills: Marketing Analytics experience across multiple roles (IPC, GRG Banking, Moli Media)
BI tools (Power BI PL-300, Looker Studio)
KPI design, attribution modelling, customer segmentation
Stakeholder communication and data storytelling (C-suite level at HSBC)
missing_skills: SQL — not mentioned in CV (likely a soft filter here, not hard requirement)
core_responsibilities: Lead and shape marketing analytics strategy across paid, CRM, lifecycle channels
Partner with marketing, product and data teams to define KPIs and measure performance
Turn complex data into actionable insights for campaign optimisation
Own and improve reporting, dashboards, and attribution models
Guide cross-functional teams and act as bridge between technical and business sides
recommended_emphasis: Lead with Marketing Analytics background across B2B and e-commerce sectors
Highlight Power BI (PL-300) and Looker Studio as explicit BI tools match
HSBC C-suite data storytelling is a strong 'bridge between technical and business' signal
Customer segmentation and attribution from CV are direct matches
SQL gap is a risk — frame as 'comfortable working with data tools, learning SQL'

company_info.size_raw: Trust In SODA: 51-200 employees (recruitment agency); client is a German e-commerce company
